commit_scope: Add an APK native-library packaging receipt for the Android core-axiom proof library.

commands: coord claim core-axiom-apk-receipt "Next carrier lane after PR #3185: inspect/prove APK or Android app packaging surface for the core-axiom native receipt binary/lib; avoid Wi-Fi/non-adb transport, sensor/raw media, BML/compiler, and world-model lanes."
local_validation.notes: The APK proof script generated an Android arm64 shared object from C, staged it into experiments/coherence-sense-android/app/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a for a clean Gradle debug build, verified the APK contains lib/arm64-v8a/libcoherence_core_axiom_receipt.so, extracted that entry, and checked the extracted entry SHA equals the generated library SHA. Receipt: kind=core-axiom-apk-native-lib-receipt, apk_sha256=a37a275e47a9a470cf8f9b4d9a77c99410371c4db3de9137fd323920b8e6015c, entry_sha256=fca60ee43d4fd6b7d3f35ffc21c40099afd8a1ba5e892b0a719005aef7f20515, generated_source_sha256=d563eda0d05611166a4f776298e6fba9755435b9493be1cb2f44328b0a2271c7, library_sha256=fca60ee43d4fd6b7d3f35ffc21c40099afd8a1ba5e892b0a719005aef7f20515, abi=arm64-v8a, samples=2048, width=8, packaged=true, executed_on_device=false, status=pass. Focused Form validation returned 4095 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. fourth-arm-gate returned PASS-4WAY core-axiom-apk-receipt.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy requested; this is a local APK native-library packaging receipt proof.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Android app packaging lane can now carry a generated native core-axiom receipt library inside the APK and verify the packaged lib entry by SHA before any JNI or installed-app execution claim is made.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Gradle APK build and local generated native library
test_flows: Build an Android arm64-v8a shared object from generated C.
Stage the shared object into Coherence Sense jniLibs for one clean APK build.
Verify the APK contains the native lib entry and that the extracted entry SHA matches the generated library SHA.
Validate the APK receipt shape four-way through fkwu.

phase_gate.gate: APK carriage of native receipt code must be verified before claiming JNI load/call or installed-app execution.
phase_gate.next: Add a Kotlin/JNI load-and-call receipt from the app process or an installed-app instrumentation receipt on the authorized Android phone.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Mac+Android native receipt/package evidence existed over adb-forward-tcp, while APK native-library carriage for that receipt code was still unproven.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: core-axiom-apk-receipt returns 4095 four-way, and latest.json records APK SHA, native lib entry SHA, generated source SHA, library SHA, ABI, sample window, packaged=true, and executed_on_device=false.
